calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Continued To Mar-28-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Jordan Wolford, Esq. for Plaintiff: M. Arthur Gensler Jr. & Associates, Inc. a California corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Meghan Rhea, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Matisee Software Inc., a California corporation, fka Fresher Information Corp., as follows:
Principal $41,653.34
Interest $10,760.00
Attorney's Fees $2,597.00
Costs $501.00 for a total of $55,511.34
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Feb. 22, 2005
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
